intro_cards.title: Formal Copula: でございます
intro_cards.body:
でございます is the most formal version of です — for highly formal settings.

• 本日のメニューでございます。
(This is today's menu — formal presentation)
• こちらが田中でございます。
(This is Tanaka — very formal introduction)

You'll encounter this in:
• Department stores and luxury hotels
• Formal ceremonies and announcements
• Traditional restaurants

In everyday speech, です is perfectly polite.
でございます is reserved for maximum formality.
